about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I'm Lukas Schaffrath – web developer with a technical teaching degree from RWTH Aachen University and a passion for digital solutions. What started as a student side job became my calling: developing modern, powerful, and affordable websites.

During my studies, I worked as a web developer and research assistant at RWTH. Today, I manage various technical projects as IT Administrator at the Institute of English Studies and work independently on web projects under the name webCommits web Designs.

I focus on sustainable, clean code and user-friendly concepts. Whether with classic web technologies like HTML, CSS, JavaScript or frameworks like Django, Ruby on Rails, Eleventy, and Symfony. I particularly enjoy supporting smaller businesses with individual solutions. I combine my technical expertise with pedagogical sensitivity and clear communication. Because good web development starts with understanding the people behind it.

webcommits.title: webCommits
webcommits.description: The website of the best web developers.

gpupgrade.title: GPUpgrade
gpupgrade.description: Web tool for analyzing and comparing GPU performance with upgrade calculator, search, and filter functions. Built with Eleventy (11ty), AlpineJS, JavaScript, and JSON database by u/SenorPeterz.

anglistikweb.title: Anglistik Web
anglistikweb.description: Office hours and booking system with login and account management. Based on Django and Python.

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.description: My personal portfolio website showcasing my projects and skills. Built with React, GSAP for animations, and a modern, responsive design. Check it out on GitHub! (Branch: redesign)

clweb.title: CL-Verkehrstechnik
clweb.description: Traffic sign plans and technology. Clear, precise, nationwide, in pure vanilla code.

lashesbydim.title: Lashes by Dim
lashesbydim.description: Interactive website for a lash stylist

benbachmair.title: Ben-Bachmair
benbachmair.description: Website of an internationally renowned professor & author, based on Vue.js.

kernbohrungen.title: Kernbohrungen Günther
kernbohrungen.description: Website of a master craftsman business in masonry and concrete construction, built with Eleventy and Nunjucks.

anzeigeschalten.title: AnzeigeSchalten
anzeigeschalten.description: A website that simplifies the process of placing ads. Created as a PWA specifically for my grandparents.

mdtopdf.title: MD to HTML/PDF Converter
mdtopdf.description: A GUI Python app that converts Markdown files to HTML or PDF. Built with Tkinter and Pandoc. With merge and export functionality for multiple files.

notion.title: Notion to Obsidian Transition Tool
notion.description: A small script that helps with the transition from Notion to Obsidian through smart file conversion.

snakegame.title: Snake Game
snakegame.description: A simple Snake clone written in Python with PyGame. Created as a self-study programming project during a didactics course.
